comment: Sample manifest for the st80-images repo. Host this file at https://raw.githubusercontent.com/avwohl/st80-images/main/manifest.json (see kManifestHost / kManifestPath in app/windows/Launcher.cpp). Each asset carries a SHA256 digest; the launcher verifies after download and deletes the file on mismatch. Replace the placeholder sha256 values with the actual `sha256sum` of the release assets before publishing.

images.label: Xerox Smalltalk-80 v2 (Wolczko)
images.description: The 1983 Xerox Blue Book virtual image as prepared by Mario Wolczko. Original source: https://github.com/dbanay/Smalltalk.
